entries.speaker: orun
lines:
You've fought Compact soldiers? Real ones? With
Arcanite weapons? Tell me everything.

entries.speaker: orun
lines:
I want to be a patrol leader like my cousin Kael. He
says I'm too eager. I say he's too careful. We're both right.

entries.speaker: orun
lines:
I killed something yesterday. Grey, hollow, used to be
a fox I think. It didn't fight back. Just looked at me while it
died. I haven't slept since.

entries.speaker: orun
lines:
Kael told me killing doesn't get easier. He lied. It
got easier. That's worse.

entries.speaker: orun
lines:
I saw a fox today. A real one. Orange and quick and
alive. It ran when it saw me. I was so happy I sat down and
cried.
